description: Time-based cycles, calendar triggers, celestial events, and dawn-to-dusk vulnerabilities.
weaknesses: Moonlight Madness
Direct moonlight strips away all control. It transforms involuntarily, losing strategy and self. It only hunts on cloudy nights and tracks the lunar calendar obsessively.
Dawn's First Light
Not sunlight, but the very first ray of dawn freezes it completely. It calculates sunrise to the second and never faces east at the wrong moment.
Rooster Crow Banish
A rooster's crow compels immediate retreat. It kills roosters first when entering a region, and silenced farmyards are a warning sign.
Birthday Vulnerability
On the anniversary of its creation, all its defenses fail. It vanishes on the same date each year, and old attack records reveal the pattern.
Broken Clock Timing
A stopped clock showing the hour of its death traps it in a loop. It smashes clocks wherever it goes, and one particular hour makes it flinch.
Sunrise Sickness
Dawn brings violent illness, not destruction. It retreats before first light and is sluggish in the early morning, a window the watchful can exploit.
Thirteenth of Month
On the thirteenth day of any month its powers wane to almost nothing. It disappears monthly on a schedule, and its calendar is full of anxious markings.
Clock Chime Freeze
It freezes at the sound of clock chimes, compelled to count every one before it can move. It destroys clock towers and dreads the stroke of noon.
Moonless Night Blind
Without moonlight it is completely blind. It goes still on moonless nights and keeps artificial moon symbols close, a poor substitute for the real thing.
Tuesday Vulnerability
Every Tuesday its defenses simply fail. The pattern is obvious to anyone tracking its weekly movements, and it destroys calendars to hide the cycle.
Four-Leaf Clover Sight
A four-leaf clover held in hand pierces all its illusions. It tramples clover patches and avoids meadows. Old lucky charms work for a reason.
